payload.answer: Committed one memory only; duplicate retries of the same input were treated idempotently.

entity_resolution.reason: The input identifies 'Sam from Goldman' but does not provide enough information to uniquely resolve which Sam or which Goldman entity. Repeated delivery of the same message should not create duplicate memories.

memory_cards.statement: Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans.

details: Stored one durable preference memory: Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans.
Did not create three duplicate memories despite the input being delivered three times.
Preserved ambiguity around the identity of Sam and Goldman.
